channel.title: Github on Mike Ball
channel.description: Recent content in Github on Mike Ball

item.title: Terraform: natively reading GitHub release assets
item.description: Reading release assets in Terraform via the `github_release_asset` data source.

item.title: Using the gh-dash gh CLI Extension to Manage GitHub Notifications
item.description: How I use the gh-dash gh CLI extension to manage GitHub notifications.

item.title: Extending the gh CLI with Go
item.description: Some introductory tips on building gh CLI extensions in Go.

item.title: Querying GitHub Release Data With gh and jq
item.description: Fetch the latest patch release of each of the latest 5 minor versions of Grafana

item.title: Triggering GitHub Actions From Outside of GitHub
item.description: An introduction to using custom repository dispatch events to trigger GitHub Actions.

item.title: Committing Via the Concourse Git Resource
item.description: How to commit to a git repo from Concourse using the git resource.

item.title: Using the ConcourseCI pull request resource to verify Docker builds
item.description: How to verify a Docker image pull request in ConcourseCI.

item.title: How to Contribute to a Project on GitHub
item.description: A simple how-to outlining the Github fork, branch, and PR workflow.
